Open slowly. Some things are meant to be discovered. Hidden
For your eyes only

Before You Begin

I sat and thought about giving you something more precious than gifts, because, as you know, this is my love language. But I couldn’t find anything valuable enough to give you, except something that cannot be held in your hands, but can stay in your mind and touch your soul and heart.

What you are about to see is just 1% of the words my tongue could speak about how much you mean to me. You are not just a regular friend, not just a best friend, and not just someone I have feelings for. You are someone I cannot imagine not having in my whole life.

When you are ready, start the story.

Memory 01

The Gift Day

Let’s begin with this one. I remember that day very well. I was excited from the very beginning of the day. I went to my English lecture, but honestly, I was only sitting there while my mind was somewhere else, thinking about how the day would go, how you would react to the gift, and what else I could add to make you look happier, more and more.

Until I saw you coming in front of me in the street. At that moment, I forgot about the whole day. When I saw you speaking and asking where we were heading, I was just looking at you, amazed by how gorgeous you were.

Then we went to 929, but we found no place. I honestly don’t remember the other place we went to after that, but I remember every single word we talked about that day, and how beautiful you looked while talking.

I also remember the words you told me when I walked you home, and no words can describe how happy I was when Soma told me that you were happy because of that day, and because of what you sent me in the WhatsApp message.

I still have those messages, and I still carry their memories in my heart.

Memory 02

The Picture You Loved

You said you love this picture because of the low and high quality within it, but I love this one because I was lucky enough to take that picture of you. I know that in the future, when I look through my phone and see it, I will remember that I was the one who took it, and that you loved it.

It was an awkward day, because I wasn’t expecting us to start talking again. But when it happened, I acted like I didn’t care. Deep inside, though, my heart was shaking from happiness, while the other half of me was scared that we might stop talking again after prom.

Until you asked me to send you the prom videos. At that moment, I felt happier than I had felt at any other moment that entire day.

Memory 03

Cilantro Day

Moving to Cilantro day, the only time we went there. I remember that day clearly. We had just started talking again after a long break, but I would like to confess something.

When I told you that we should go there to study, that was not really the plan. I only said that so it wouldn’t feel awkward when I asked you to go out with me.

And I swear, I don’t even know what was written on the laptop screen that day.

Memory 04

The Picture I Truly Love

Continuing with the pictures of you on my phone, this is the one I truly love the most. And this is the second thing I want to thank Roaa for, after being the reason I got to know you.

I love this picture because I feel like it describes exactly how I feel when I am with you or even just talking to you. It shows the peace I feel around you, the happiness that appears inside me without even trying, and the way my heart becomes calmer whenever you are near.

And honestly, it also shows how I see you in my heart. Your eyes, your face, your smile, and the softness in the way you look are all more beautiful than words can describe. There is something about you that feels different, something warm, pure, and unforgettable.

Every time I look at this photo, I don’t just see a picture. I see a memory, a feeling, and a person who means more to me than anyone could ever understand.

Memory 05

Country Hills Day

That day was very bad from its beginning, and seeing you was not even part of the plan. But when it happened, and we went to Country Hills, everything changed completely. The whole day turned from something heavy into something I will always remember with a smile.

I still remember how beautiful you looked that day, and I remember our conversation that night, how comfortable it felt, and how this photo was taken.

I love the photos I took of you that day, especially this one, because it carries your smile in a way that feels honest, warm, and impossible to forget.

And to be honest, the biceps are still small.

Memory 06

The Day I Planned Since January

Until we reached that day, the day I had been planning for since January, thinking about how I could make you the happiest person in the world.

I didn’t want to surprise you only by going out, giving you the gift, and drinking coffee. I wanted to add something special to the day, something different, and I found no better option than inviting the friends you love, so you could be happy, just like I feel happy because of your existence.

I can’t forget your reaction when they arrived. I can’t forget the look on your face, the surprise, and the happiness in your eyes. I also remember how nervous I was in the middle of the conversation, afraid that my joking with Mariam might feel a little too silly or annoying.

But in the end, that day became the happiest day for me in 2025, because I saw you happy because of something I did.

Before the last part

One More Thing

After these short words about every memory we have lived together, I would like to send you a new poem instead of the one deleted by WhatsApp.

And honestly, I am very grateful that WhatsApp did not restore the backup, because the old one was too weak to describe what you truly mean to me.

Maybe losing it was not a bad thing after all. Maybe it gave me the chance to write something better, something closer to the way I really see you.

The poem

For You

Of all the people life has placed in my way,
You were never just another face in time,
You were the pause inside my longest day,
The softest meaning hidden between each line.

Years passed between us like changing skies,
Some days were close, and some were far,
Yet every time I met your eyes,
It felt like finding the same old star.

We laughed through moments no one else would know,
Through little talks and memories we still keep,
Through days that passed too fast to hold,
And nights that stayed inside me deep.

And maybe what I feel was never loud,
Not something I could simply say,
It lived in silence, calm and proud,
And found its place in every day.

Because you were never just a friend to me,
Not just a name I love to hear,
You became a part of what I see,
In every beautiful thing that comes near.

There is something in the way you smile,
That makes the world feel less heavy to carry,
Something in your eyes that stays for a while,
Like a memory my heart refuses to bury.

You have a kindness that cannot be taught,
A soul that feels like peace and light,
And sometimes I wonder how life brought
Someone like you into my sight.

I do not think you know how much you mean,
How your presence can change the air,
How even in the quiet spaces between,
I still feel lucky that you are there.

And maybe I have hidden more than I showed,
Maybe some words stayed trapped inside,
Maybe my heart knew a different road,
But chose to love you softly with pride.

Not every feeling needs to be spoken,
Not every love needs a perfect name,
Some bonds are rare, deep, and unbroken,
And even in silence, they stay the same.

You are the person I search for in others,
In voices, in laughter, in every face,
But no one carries your colors,
And no one could ever take your place.

Because what we have is not ordinary,
It is not something time can undo,
It is a friendship, yes, but also a memory
That my heart always connects to you.

So here’s to every day we shared,
To every laugh, every look, every start,
To all the moments that proved you cared,
And all the ones I kept in my heart.

No matter where life takes us through,
No matter what changes or stays unknown,
A part of me will always be thankful for you,
For making this life feel less alone.
